active_projects.completion_summary: Added agents_subdir configuration to extension system (3 files modified): config.lua now supports configurable agent subdirectory paths, loader.lua respects agents_subdir when copying agent files, init.lua passes agents_subdir from config to loader. artifacts.summary: Research identifying extension loader path mismatch: missing agents_subdir in extension config causes files to be placed in agents/ instead of agent/subagents/ for OpenCode
